name: pulsar
description: Pulsar — messagerie temps réel (serveurs, vocal, DM) + features signature
author: Tom <tom.ochietti@gmail.com>

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k -n server,client,electron -c blue,magenta,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.desktop:build: npm --prefix client run build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.desktop:publish: npm --prefix client run build && electron-builder --publish always
